title: pandanus novohibernicus var. contractus
intro: Pandanus novohibernicus var. contractus, also known as the Dwarf Pandan or Screw Palm, is a small evergreen shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Pandanus genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pandanus novohibernicus var. contractus include soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
